Q3 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

The load on an AM diode detector consists of a resistance of 50 kΩ in parallel with a capacitor of 0.01 μF. The maximum modulation index that the detector can handle without distortion when modulating frequency is 7 kHz is __________. (rounded off to three decimal places).

NAT
Correct answer: 0.045 (0.040 - 0.049)
Solution

0.045 (0.040 - 0.049)

(a)

Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0

NAT
Correct answer: 75 (74 - 76)
Solution

75 (74 - 76)

Q27 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A 2 kHz single tone signal is used to generate both AM and an FM signal. The modulation index β of FM signal is 8. If the frequency component at (fc ± 2000) Hz have the same magnitude in AM as well as in FM signal, then the efficiency of the AM modulated signal is ________%. (upto two decimal places)
(Assume J1(8) = 0.24)

NAT
Correct answer: 10.33
Solution

10.33 (10.25 - 10.35)

Q28 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

Which of the following statements is not correct?

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
• The purpose of the limiter is to provide a constant level of the signal to the FM demodulator, thus reducing the effect of signal level changes in the output.
• Amplitude modulation are linear modulation scheme whereas angle modulation are non-linear modulation scheme.
• In modulation, base band signal is converted to bandpass signal, whereby the signal is shifted to a higher frequency range.
